cliQuickLink.en: Prefer the CLI? Jump to [CLI installation and usage](#cli-schemaui-cli).
cliQuickLink.zh: 想直接使用 CLI？跳转到 [CLI 安装与用法](#cli-schemaui-cli)。

intro.en: The installed binary is always named `schemaui`, so the normal entry point is `schemaui -c ./config.json`.
intro.zh: 安装后的实际可执行文件名始终是 `schemaui`，所以常规入口仍然是 `schemaui -c ./config.json`。

summary.zh: 使用 Cargo 从 crates.io 编译安装。

summary.en: Fetch prebuilt GitHub release binaries through cargo-binstall.
summary.zh: 通过 cargo-binstall 拉取预构建的 GitHub release 二进制。

summary.en: Install from the repository tap on macOS or Linux.
summary.zh: 在 macOS 或 Linux 上通过仓库 tap 安装。

summary.en: Install on Windows from the repository-hosted Scoop manifest.
summary.zh: 在 Windows 上通过仓库内维护的 Scoop manifest 安装。

summary.en: Download the matching archive from `https://github.com/YuniqueUnic/schemaui/releases/latest`, extract `schemaui` / `schemaui.exe`, and place it on your `PATH`.
summary.zh: 从 `https://github.com/YuniqueUnic/schemaui/releases/latest` 下载对应平台压缩包，解压 `schemaui` / `schemaui.exe` 后放到 `PATH` 中。

summary.en: Use the versioned manifests in `packaging/winget` with `winget install --manifest <dir>`, or submit them upstream to the community repository.
summary.zh: 使用 `packaging/winget` 中的 versioned manifests 配合 `winget install --manifest <dir>` 安装，或将其提交到社区仓库。
